output: {"file": "apps/gui/src/features/canvas/InspectorPanel.tsx", "summary": "Enhanced Inspector Panel Conditions tab with full Condition Builder implementation", "features": ["Mode selector (Simple | Expression | Python) with icons", "Simple mode: dropdown-based condition builder with IF/THEN/ELSE rows, condition types (output_contains, status_equals, cost_exceeds, duration_exceeds, artifact_exists, always), operators (contains, equals, starts_with, ends_with, greater_than, less_than, exists), + Add condition button, remove condition button", "Expression mode: Jinja2-style textarea with 160px min-height, live validation with green checkmark (valid) or red X (invalid) + error message, validation indicator at bottom-right, autocomplete popup for available variables (outputs.*, artifacts.*, workflow.*, step.*), branch configuration (IF TRUE/IF FALSE), Last Run Result display", "Python mode: Monaco Editor with Python syntax highlighting, 240px min-height, pre-loaded workflow_state dict stub, sandbox warning banner, Test Condition button with loading state, test result display (green True / red False), branch configuration", "Incoming conditions list (read-only): shows connections targeting this node with arrow icons, node names, and connection types", "Design: bg-surface #16161C, bg-canvas #0D0D12 for editor areas, border-subtle #2D2D35, accent-primary #5E6AD2, 40px row height, micro-upper labels", "TypeScript: all types properly defined, no errors"]}
